briefdescription.para: A concept describing an interpolation evaluator.

detaileddescription.para: An interpolation evaluator is a callable that takes a field of interpolation coefficients (on a basis domain) and produces function values on an evaluation mesh, optionally at user-supplied coordinates.

Type information is accessed through InterpolationEvaluatorTraits<Evaluator>, which has a primary template delegating to the evaluator's own aliases and can be specialised for external evaluators (e.g. ddc::SplineEvaluator).
The template alias and method requirements are verified using evaluation_idx_range_type as a representative domain.
